docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE SETTLED. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $750.00 (INCLUSIVE OF COSTS) DEFENDANT PAYS PLAINTIFF THE AGREED AMOUNT BY PAYPAL IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF VICKTO STEVENSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COCO GUILHEM IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY STEVENSON, VICKTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GUILHEM, COCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SETTLED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED FEB-25-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUILHEM, COCO
